executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: stale same-session evidence is being reused as if it were current truth
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: enforce code-level fresh probes for operational queries

evidence_pack.location: turn where agent answered before using shell_exec
evidence_pack.summary: The first reply claimed inability to directly inspect stdout without any tool call.
A stale port-listener artifact persisted an old PID and later steered repeated answers.
Operational queries were allowed to complete without hard tool enforcement.

findings.title: Operational answers can bypass real inspection
findings.symptom: Agent gives confident system-state answers before tools run.
findings.user_impact: Users receive wrong server facts with high confidence.
findings.mechanism: Tool usage is encouraged in prompt text but not always required by code.
findings.root_cause: Prompt-enforced discipline instead of code-enforced discipline.
findings.recommended_fix: Introduce task classification plus mandatory probe execution before final answer.

findings.title: Same-session stale evidence contaminates later turns
findings.symptom: The agent repeats an old PID or old IP result after the runtime has changed.
findings.user_impact: Correct early evidence becomes dangerous stale evidence later in the same conversation.
findings.mechanism: Prior tool observations survive in history and durable artifacts without freshness checks.
findings.root_cause: No mandatory current-turn evidence binding for operational conclusions.
findings.recommended_fix: Bind system-state answers to fresh current-turn probes and tag them with evidence timestamps.

conflict_map.note: Old evidence is accepted as if it were fresh.
Interim conclusions become durable knowledge too early.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Force fresh probes for system-state queries
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: It removes the most damaging correctness failure immediately.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Reduce same-session reentry of distilled artifacts
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: It cuts one of the strongest contamination paths.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Less drift across repeated questions in the same session.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Move internal state passing to JSON envelopes
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: It reduces prompt entropy and duplicate prose injection.
